title: matricaria intermedia
intro: Matricaria intermedia, also known as intermediate chamomile, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it a useful remedy for soothing digestive issues and calming the nervous system. The health benefits of Matricaria intermedia include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Matricaria intermedia often include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
